top_signals.title: Trump Thinks Musk Will Donate SpaceX Stock to Trump Accounts
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump said he thinks Elon Musk will donate SpaceX stock to the Trump accounts initiative, following other technology executives who have embraced the new investment vehicles for children.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
